testcase.name: test_patient_default_meta

failure.message: pydantic_core._pydantic_core.ValidationError: 1 validation error for Patient Value error, Patient muss mindestens eine KVNR oder PID (MR/PI) als Identifier haben. [type=value_error, input_value={'identifier': [Identifie...irthDate': '2000-01-01'}, input_type=dict] For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/value_error

testcase.failure:
self = <test_fhir_models.TestPatient object at 0x0000022B434D9A30>
def test_patient_default_meta(self): """Ohne explizites meta wird das ISiK-Profil automatisch gesetzt.""" > patient = Patient( identifier=[Identifier(value="TEST")], name=[HumanName(family="Test")], gender="female", birthDate="2000-01-01", ) E pydantic_core._pydantic_core.ValidationError: 1 validation error for Patient E Value error, Patient muss mindestens eine KVNR oder PID (MR/PI) als Identifier haben. [type=value_error, input_value={'identifier': [Identifie...irthDate': '2000-01-01'}, input_type=dict] E For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/value_error
tests\test_fhir_models.py:209: ValidationError

testcase.name: test_encounter_class_populate_by_name

failure.message: pydantic_core._pydantic_core.ValidationError: 1 validation error for Encounter Value error, Encounter muss zwingend eine Fallnummer (Identifier Typ 'VN' oder passendes System) haben. [type=value_error, input_value={'identifier': [Identifie...ier=None, display=None)}, input_type=dict] For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/value_error

testcase.failure:
self = <test_fhir_models.TestEncounter object at 0x0000022B43739E00>
def test_encounter_class_populate_by_name(self): """Encounter kann auch via class_=... in Python instanziiert werden.""" > encounter = Encounter( identifier=[Identifier(value="F-001")], status="planned", class_=Coding( system="http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActCode", code="AMB", ), subject=Reference(reference="Patient/1"), ) E pydantic_core._pydantic_core.ValidationError: 1 validation error for Encounter E Value error, Encounter muss zwingend eine Fallnummer (Identifier Typ 'VN' oder passendes System) haben. [type=value_error, input_value={'identifier': [Identifie...ier=None, display=None)}, input_type=dict] E For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/value_error
tests\test_fhir_models.py:260: ValidationError
